common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: update bundle deal. Relevant restrictions refer to FAQ：https://open.shopee.com/faq/254

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_discount_value_invalid_range
error_list.description: Discount value should be within Price range.

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_end_time_error
error_list.description: Promotion end time can only be changed to an earlier timing.

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_error_unknown
error_list.description: Unknown error occurred in the service

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_exceed_remaining_time_limit
error_list.description: The bundle deal end time must earlier than the max allowed current time

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_fix_price_invalid_range
error_list.description: Fix price should be within Price range.

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_multi_tier_invalid_fix_price_per_item
error_list.description: Higher tier should have lower price per item (price per item = fixed bundle price / item amount)

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_multi_tier_feature_toggle
error_list.description: Cannot create multi-tier bundle deals

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_name_length
error_list.description: Name length can't be less than 1 or greater than 25

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_no_auth_update
error_list.description: The shopee created bundle deal can't be edited

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_not_exists
error_list.description: Bundle deal doesn't existed

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_ongoing_promotion_info_lock
error_list.description: Cannot change rule_type, fix_price, discount_percentage, discount_value or tiers number if Bundle deal is ongoing.

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_ongoing_promotion_info_lock_min_amount
error_list.description: Cannot change min_amount if Bundle deal is ongoing and has enabled items

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_over_min_amount
error_list.description: The item amount can't exceed 3000

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_over_tier
error_list.description: Max bundle tier allowed is 3

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_rule_type_error
error_list.description: The rule type of ongoing bundle deal can't be edited

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_rule_type_mix_use
error_list.description: Please use consistent rule type

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_rule_type_value
error_list.description: Please use correct bundle deal rule type

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_tier_invalid
error_list.description: The discount off for tier 1 must be < 90%%

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_under_min_amount
error_list.description: The item amount should be greater than 1

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_under_min_amount_multi_tier
error_list.description: The item amount should be greater than the previous tier

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_invaild_discount_percentage
error_list.description: Discount percentage should not less than 1%% and not more than 99%%

error_list.name: error_network
error_list.description: Inner http call failed

error_list.name: error_data
error_list.description: parse data failed

error_list.name: error_data
error_list.description: data not exist

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: parameter invalid

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Wrong parameters, detail: {msg}.

error_list.name: error_server
error_list.description: Something wrong. Please try later.

error_list.name: error_shop
error_list.description: shopid is invalid

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: request not from gateway

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_start_time_error
error_list.description: Promotion start time can only be changed to a later timing.

error_list.name: bundle.bundle_deal_start_time_error
error_list.description: The start_time of ongoing promotion can't be updated

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: partner_id is invalid

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: The App is deleted, and you'll be unable to make any API call.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: App developer’s permissions for authorizations have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no partner_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid timestamp

common_error_list.description: Wrong sign.

common_error_list.name: invalid_partner_id
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission to current api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_call_restricted
common_error_list.description: The App permission for api call have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: api_suspended
common_error_list.description: The API is offline. Please call v2 API instead.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Permission denied. This API is currently offline or the request path is incorrect.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Partner_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is expired.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_permission
common_error_list.description: This app type has no permission to this API.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no access_token in query.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shopid.

common_error_list.name: shop_no_linked
common_error_list.description: Partner and shop has no linked.

common_error_list.name: shop_banned
common_error_list.description: The shop account has been banned. Permissions for shop authorization and API calls have been suspended until the shop account is restored.

common_error_list.name: invalid_acceess_token
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: partner_shop_no_link
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shop_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_ashop_api_permission
common_error_list.description: The shop is Affiliate shop has no permission to call this API.

common_error_list.name: error_kyc_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission. Please inform the seller to complete the Seller Registration on Shopee Seller Center first, then this shop can call for this API.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: System error, please try again later.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no shop_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: shop_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

request_params.name: rule_type
request_params.description: The bundle deal rule type：FIX_PRICE = 1 ；DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE = 2； DISCOUNT_VALUE = 3

request_params.name: discount_value
request_params.description: The deducted price when when buying a bundle deal. Need to input it when the bundle deal rule type is 3

request_params.name: fix_price
request_params.description: The amount of the buyer needs to spend to purchase a bundle deal.Need to input it when the bundle deal rule type is 1

request_params.name: discount_percentage
request_params.description: The discount that the buyer can get when buying a bundle deal. Need to input it when the bundle deal rule type is 2

request_params.name: min_amount
request_params.description: The quantity of items that need buyer to combine purchased

request_params.name: start_time
request_params.description: The time when bundle deal activity start.The start time must be later than current time.

request_params.name: end_time
request_params.description: The time when bundle deal activity end. The end time must be later than current time.

request_params.name: purchase_limit
request_params.description: Maximum number of bundle deals that can be bought by a buyer.

request_params.name: bundle_deal_id
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a bundle deal activity.

Use to create tiered discount for bundle deals, a max of 2 additional tiers are allowed to create bundle deals like buy 2 get 10% off, buy 3 for 15% off, buy 4 for 20% off; For each tier, we will need to set the following 4 values based on bundle deal type +    min_amount = IntAttribute() +    fix_price = IntAttribute() +    discount_percentage = IntAttribute() +    discount_value = IntAttribute()Note: for additional tiers, the fix price, discount_percentage, discount_value should be consistent with tier 1
request_params.name: additional_tiers

children.description: The quantity of items that the buyers need to purchase for additional tier
children.name: min_amount

children.description: The bundle price when the buyers purchase a bundle deal for additional tiers. Need to input it when the bundle deal rule type is 1.
children.name: fix_price

children.description: The bundle deal discount amount the buyer can save when purchasing a bundle deal. Need to input it when the bundle deal rule type is 3
children.name: discount_value

children.description: The bundle deal discount% that the buyer can get when buying a bundle deal for additional tiers. Need to input it when the bundle deal rule type is 2
children.name: discount_percentage

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking
